title: Filtering location, example, suburb name
excerpt: Currently, the only options available for filtering a location type column are “is empty” or “is not empty,” and the value option is not available. I have a location type for the suburb and I’d like to be able to filter …

posts.author: CarlyPlanC (Carly)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, the only options available for filtering a location type column are “is empty” or “is not empty,” and the value option is not available. I have a location type for the suburb and I’d like to be able to filter for all those with a particular suburb.
